01 — Our Story

A Medford Staple
for Comfortable Stays

Harvey's Motel has been a trusted name in Medford lodging for years. Conveniently situated on South Central Avenue, we offer clean, renovated rooms at rates that make sense for every traveler.

Whether you're traveling through on I-5, exploring Southern Oregon's natural wonders, visiting family in the Rogue Valley, or staying for work — we're ready to make your stay comfortable and stress-free. Call us and we'll find the right room for you.

Clean, Renovated Rooms
Affordable Nightly Rates
Central Medford Location
Free On-Site Parking
Friendly, Helpful Staff
Easy Access to I-5
Daily Housekeeping
Extended Stay Options

05 — Southern Oregon

Explore Medford
& the Rogue Valley

Harvey's Motel puts you right in the middle of it all. Use us as your base for everything Southern Oregon has to offer.

🌋~1 hr away

National Park

Crater Lake

The deepest lake in the US — born from a collapsed volcano. Brilliant cobalt-blue waters and world-class dark skies.

🍷Multiple nearby

Wine Country

Rogue Valley Wineries

Over 150 wineries in a Forbes-recognized global wine destination. Known for Pinot Noir, Merlot, and stunning valley scenery.

🎭20 min to Ashland

Arts & Culture

Oregon Shakespeare Festival

One of the largest nonprofit regional theaters in the US — world-renowned productions February through October.

⛰️20 min away

Nature & Hiking

Upper & Lower Table Rock

Two dramatic flat-topped buttes above the Rogue River — seasonal wildflowers, raptors, and sweeping panoramic views.

🌲5 min away

Parks & Recreation

Bear Creek Park

A beloved Medford park along Bear Creek — perfect for picnics, walking, and family time right in the city.

✈️~10 min drive

Getting Here

Rogue Valley Airport (MFR)

Medford's regional airport is just a short drive away. Easy rideshare access from arrivals to our front door.

06 — Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

Don't just take our word for it — here's what real guests have said about their stay at Harvey's Motel on Google.

★★★★★

"Staff was very accommodating and tried their best considering their guests. I enjoyed the double room, extra housekeeping, walk to the library or Nick's authentic Italian Restaurant & close to bus lines for shopping. Staff even replaced old with new toilet. Clean firm beds, cold A/C. Nice price. Thank you, Ryan."

👤
R. Leaver

08 — FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes — parking is completely free for all guests. We have on-site parking right outside your room door, no fees, no hassle.
We do not allow pets at Harvey's Motel. Thank you for understanding.
Harvey's Motel is a non-smoking property. Smoking is not permitted in any rooms or on the premises. Thank you for respecting our policy.
Check-in is flexible — whenever works for you! Just give us a call when you're on your way and we'll have your room ready.
Just call us at (541) 779-6561 — we'll check availability and get you booked in minutes. No online system, just friendly service.
Yes — free WiFi is included with every room at no extra charge. Stay connected throughout your entire stay.
Yes! If you're staying for a week or longer — whether for work or an extended visit — call us and we'll work out a rate that makes sense for you.
We're at 510 South Central Ave, Medford, OR 97501 — right on one of Medford's main corridors, minutes from I-5, restaurants, and shopping.
Every room includes free WiFi, free parking, cable TV, air conditioning & heat, daily housekeeping, private bathroom, and a micro-fridge.
